title: EMI++
description: A mod that added many features to EMI!
body:
Discord server: [https://discord.gg/4B3B9Zy253](https://discord.gg/4B3B9Zy253)

All the features are configurable in EMI's config screen! 

Add many useful features to EMI:
- Creative mode tabs: Dedicated tabs like creative inventory (e.g., Redstone Blocks, "Colored Blocks) for instant access to mod-specific items.
- Collapsible item groups: Foldable subgroups (e.g., "Walls", "Planks", and "Potions") to tidy inventory, hide unused items, and let players customize groupings for faster item retrieval.
- Villager trade recipes: Support viewing villagers' trading recipes in EMI! (However, it does not support the rebalanced trading by now)
